entry.title: IDC SAQMMA10D0017 (M018) awarded to CSRA LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSES OF THIS MODIFICATION ARE TO CORRECT THE CONTRACTOR'S ADDRESS, DUNS NUMBER, CAGE CODE, AND REVISE THE FORM DD 254 UNDER THE UNDER CONTRACT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC SAQMMA10D0017 (M027) awarded to CSRA LLC, was modified for the amount of $0
